title: Sune Fischer
text: Home * People * Sune Fischer Sune Fischer [1] Sune Fischer , a Danish physicist, computer scientist and full-stack .NET developer with experience and interests in solution architecture , cloud computing , code quality , agile processes , automated testing and CI\CD \ DevOps [2] . He holds a Bachelor in physics in 2001 from University of Copenhagen on simulated annealing and travelling salesman problem , covering Metropolis–Hastings algorithm , thermodynamics and statistical mechanics , and further worked on neural networks . As a chess player and computer chess programmer, Sune Fischer is author of the Chess Engine Communication Protocol and UCI compatible chess engine Frenzee , previously known as ChessCraft [3] . Along with Pradu Kannan , he contributed to the Chess Programming Wiki in 2007 with the examination on Pawn Advantage, Win Percentage, and Elo .
